name: Red Lobster Easy Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Pk Lorna Doone cookies; crush
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crushed cookies, butter, sugar, and gelatin until combined.
2. Pat the mixture evenly over the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for exactly 8 minutes.
4. Beat the cream cheese, sour cream, eggs, butter, cornstarch, sugar, and vanilla with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy.
5. Pour the filling into the crust.
6. Return to the oven and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 to 35 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
7. Cool in the pan on a rack for 20 minutes before releasing the springform from the cake.
8. Allow to cool another 20 minutes before cutting.
9. Sprinkle with crushed cookie crumbs before serving.
